name: Miniature Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 35 degrees F.
2. Line muffin tins with paper baking cups.
3. Place wafer in each cup.
4. Beat remaining ingredients together until light and fluffy.
5. Fill cups 2/3 full with cheese mixture.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes.
7. Garnish with sour or whipped cream, nuts, fruit or shaved chocolate.
